TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Adus
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: aiza andiia sia bununa hai sadus asu mas a sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiГ°a andiia Й•ia bununa x~ПҮai sadus asu mas a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.FORM: aiza andiia sia bununa hai sadus asu mas a sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiГ°a andiia Й•ia bununa x~ПҮai sadus asu mas a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: There was a small boy looking at a dog and a frog.

S.FORM: sia aiza panan dangian sia danuma alipuas asu ingadah a sisiuha.
S.PHON: Й•ia aiГ°a panan daЕӢian Й•ia danuma al~Й¬ipuas asu iЕӢadax~ПҮ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.
S.FORM: sia aiza panan dangian sia danuma alipuas asu ingadah a sisiuha.
S.PHON: Й•ia aiГ°a panan daЕӢian Й•ia danuma al~Й¬ipuas asu iЕӢadax~ПҮ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.
S.TRANSL: The dog is keeping a frog in a bottle.

S.FORM: at adii amin uvaaza sadu.
S.PHON: at adii amin uvaaГ°a sadu.
S.FORM: at adii amin uvaaza sadu.
S.PHON: at adii amin uvaaГ°a sadu.
S.TRANSL: The boy is also looking at the frog.

S.FORM: at aiza adiia kucua.
S.PHON: at aiГ°a adiia kuКЁua.
S.FORM: at aiza adiia kucua.
S.PHON: at aiГ°a adiia kuКЁua.

S.FORM: at minnadii hai masabah a uvaaza alibaan a asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai masabax~ПҮ a uvaaГ°a al~Й¬ibaan a asua.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai masabah a uvaaza alibaan a asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai masabax~ПҮ a uvaaГ°a al~Й¬ibaan a asua.

TRANSL.notes: Here (on this page), the boy is holding the dog while sleeping.

S.TRANSL: Here , the boy is holding the dog while sleeping.

S.FORM: ungat mun'apav adiia sisiuha.
S.PHON: uЕӢat munК”apav adiia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.
S.FORM: ungat mun'apav adiia sisiuha.
S.PHON: uЕӢat munК”apav adiia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.

S.FORM: namin'uni naias pasisiskun saicia mudadaan.
S.PHON: naminК”uni naias paЙ•iЙ•iskun saiКЁia mudadaan.
S.FORM: namin'uni naias pasisiskun saicia mudadaan.
S.PHON: naminК”uni naias paЙ•iЙ•iskun saiКЁia mudadaan.

S.FORM: at minnatasipalin dii hai masabahang a uvaaz at nii asua.
S.PHON: at minnataЙ•ipal~Й¬in dii x~ПҮai masabax~ПҮaЕӢ a uvaaГ° at nii asua.
S.FORM: at minnatasipalin dii hai masabahang a uvaaz at nii asua.
S.PHON: at minnataЙ•ipal~Й¬in dii x~ПҮai masabax~ПҮaЕӢ a uvaaГ° at nii asua.
S.TRANSL: On this page, the boy iss still sleeping, but the dog isn't.

S.FORM: at ukaang sisiuha ingadahang saia pancia.
S.PHON: at ukaaЕӢ Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa iЕӢadax~ПҮaЕӢ saia panКЁia.
S.FORM: at ukaang sisiuha ingadahang saia pancia.
S.PHON: at ukaaЕӢ Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa iЕӢadax~ПҮaЕӢ saia panКЁia.
S.TRANSL: Then the frog is gone. Is it still inside the bottle?

S.FORM: ingadahang pan mainiiai naingadah sia kucucia.
S.PHON: iЕӢadax~ПҮaЕӢ pan mainiiai naiЕӢadax~ПҮ Й•ia kuКЁuКЁia.
S.FORM: ingadahang pan mainiiai naingadah sia kucucia.
S.PHON: iЕӢadax~ПҮaЕӢ pan mainiiai naiЕӢadax~ПҮ Й•ia kuКЁuКЁia.
S.TRANSL: Is it still in the bottle? If not, then it must be in the shoes.

S.FORM: maupacia saia.
S.PHON: maupaКЁia saia.
S.FORM: maupacia saia.
S.PHON: maupaКЁia saia.

S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai inkaduanin a sia sisiuha tu naingadah saia sia sapilcia pahasia ansahanun saicia.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~ПҮai inkaduanin a Й•ia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa tu naiЕӢadax~ПҮ saia Й•ia sapil~Й¬КЁia pax~ПҮaЙ•ia ansax~ПҮanun saiКЁia.
S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai inkaduanin a sia sisiuha tu naingadah saia sia sapilcia pahasia ansahanun saicia.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~ПҮai inkaduanin a Й•ia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa tu naiЕӢadax~ПҮ saia Й•ia sapil~Й¬КЁia pax~ПҮaЙ•ia ansax~ПҮanun saiКЁia.

TRANSL.notes: Then here, (the boy thingks) the frog might be in the shoes and maybe he will find the frog, so he lifts the shoes.

S.TRANSL: Then here, the frog might be in the shoes and maybe he will find the frog, so he lifts the shoes.

S.FORM: at aupa adii a asu.
S.PHON: at aupa adii a asu.
S.FORM: at aupa adii a asu.
S.PHON: at aupa adii a asu.
S.TRANSL: Then the dog is searching as well.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin hai idiipin saia malala'la kikilim tu isa munpungav.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin x~ПҮai idiipin saia mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a kikil~Й¬im tu isa munpuЕӢav.
S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin hai idiipin saia malala'la kikilim tu isa munpungav.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin x~ПҮai idiipin saia mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a kikil~Й¬im tu isa munpuЕӢav.
S.TRANSL: Until here, he keeps on shouting and looking: "Where did you go?"

S.FORM: isuka adii sisiuha.
S.PHON: isuka adii Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.
S.FORM: isuka adii sisiuha.
S.PHON: isuka adii Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.

S.FORM: at kaupas asucia malmangha amin asu malala'la.
S.PHON: at kaupas asuКЁia mal~Й¬maЕӢx~ПҮa amin asu mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a.
S.FORM: at kaupas asucia malmangha amin asu malala'la.
S.PHON: at kaupas asuКЁia mal~Й¬maЕӢx~ПҮa amin asu mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a.
S.TRANSL: Then there's only the dog looking up and calling for it.

S.FORM: isia lumah hai kui uka.
S.PHON: iЙ•ia l~Й¬umax~ПҮ x~ПҮai kui uka.
S.FORM: isia lumah hai kui uka.
S.PHON: iЙ•ia l~Й¬umax~ПҮ x~ПҮai kui uka.
S.TRANSL: It's not in the house. What should we do?

S.FORM: at adiia asu ka ingadah amin sia pan.
S.PHON: at adiia asu ka iЕӢadax~ПҮ amin Й•ia pan.
S.FORM: at adiia asu ka ingadah amin sia pan.
S.PHON: at adiia asu ka iЕӢadax~ПҮ amin Й•ia pan.
S.TRANSL: Then the dog also got into the bottle.

S.FORM: at adiia uvaaza isia siul lumah malmamangdav mastatala.
S.PHON: at adiia uvaaГ°a iЙ•ia Й•iul~Й¬ l~Й¬umax~ПҮ mal~Й¬mamaЕӢdav mastatal~Й¬a.
S.FORM: at adiia uvaaza isia siul lumah malmamangdav mastatala.
S.PHON: at adiia uvaaГ°a iЙ•ia Й•iul~Й¬ l~Й¬umax~ПҮ mal~Й¬mamaЕӢdav mastatal~Й¬a.
S.TRANSL: The boy kept on looking down from the window and waiting.

S.FORM: at minsuma asua hai damuun saicia sikaput.
S.PHON: at minsuma asua x~ПҮai damuun saiКЁia Й•ikaput.
S.FORM: at minsuma asua hai damuun saicia sikaput.
S.PHON: at minsuma asua x~ПҮai damuun saiКЁia Й•ikaput.
S.TRANSL: Then the dog also came. He held it tightly.

S.FORM: at ukaang a sisiuh.
S.PHON: at ukaaЕӢ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.FORM: at ukaang a sisiuh.
S.PHON: at ukaaЕӢ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: But there was still no trace of the frog.

S.FORM: a naaiza aupa tu dudusa.
S.PHON: a naaiГ°a aupa tu dudusa.
S.FORM: a naaiza aupa tu dudusa.
S.PHON: a naaiГ°a aupa tu dudusa.
S.TRANSL: Are there two of them? [boy and dog]

S.FORM: at minnadii diian hai malala'laang mudaan naia amin maisinalumah.
S.PHON: at minnadii diian x~ПҮai mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬aaЕӢ mudaan naia amin maiЙ•inal~Й¬umax~ПҮ.
S.FORM: at minnadii diian hai malala'laang mudaan naia amin maisinalumah.
S.PHON: at minnadii diian x~ПҮai mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬aaЕӢ mudaan naia amin maiЙ•inal~Й¬umax~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: Here, they were still calling and leaving the house.

S.FORM: tandudusa asucia malala'la kikilim.
S.PHON: tandudusa asuКЁia mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a kikil~Й¬im.
S.FORM: tandudusa asucia malala'la kikilim.
S.PHON: tandudusa asuКЁia mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a kikil~Й¬im.
S.TRANSL: The two of them went together, calling out loud and looking around.

S.FORM: uka at usaduas pahusaz tu aiza idii pahusaza isia libusa isia lukis malkazingking.
S.PHON: uka at usaduas pax~ПҮusaГ° tu aiГ°a idii pax~ПҮusaГ°a iЙ•ia l~Й¬ibusa iЙ•ia l~Й¬ukis mal~Й¬kaГ°iЕӢkiЕӢ.
S.FORM: uka at usaduas pahusaz tu aiza idii pahusaza isia libusa isia lukis malkazingking.
S.PHON: uka at usaduas pax~ПҮusaГ° tu aiГ°a idii pax~ПҮusaГ°a iЙ•ia l~Й¬ibusa iЙ•ia l~Й¬ukis mal~Й¬kaГ°iЕӢkiЕӢ.
S.TRANSL: It was not there. Then in the forest they saw there was a hornet nest on the tree.

S.FORM: hai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pahusaza akadii minnadii hai.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pax~ПҮusaГ°a akadii minnadii x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: hai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pahusaza akadii minnadii hai.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai ka uka at kusbabai duma tauk tasatasa pax~ПҮusaГ°a akadii minnadii x~ПҮai.
S.TRANSL: Not here. Then the hornets flied out around one by one.

S.FORM: minkakalapat a asua asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: minkakal~Й¬apat a asua asa maus pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia.
S.FORM: minkakalapat a asua asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: minkakal~Й¬apat a asua asa maus pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia.
S.TRANSL: The dog wanted to climb up the whole time to eat the hornet nest.

S.FORM: masisivit adiia ingadahcia sisiuh hai.
S.PHON: maЙ•iЙ•ivit adiia iЕӢadax~ПҮКЁia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: masisivit adiia ingadahcia sisiuh hai.
S.PHON: maЙ•iЙ•ivit adiia iЕӢadax~ПҮКЁia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ x~ПҮai.
S.TRANSL: He kept on looking if the frog was inside.

S.FORM: amus minnatasipalincia mais sivitun a laak adu ingadah minnatasipalin at mapising a uvaaza mas cin tumbak adiia hai namuzaszas a pahusaza at masisivit a sisiuha tu mikuabis uvaazan namapa'ias tahis.
S.PHON: amus minnataЙ•ipal~Й¬inКЁia mais Й•ivitun a l~Й¬aak adu iЕӢadax~ПҮ minnataЙ•ipal~Й¬in at mapiЙ•iЕӢ a uvaaГ°a mas КЁin tumbak adiia x~ПҮai namuГ°asГ°as a pax~ПҮusaГ°a at maЙ•iЙ•ivit a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa tu mikuabis uvaaГ°an namapaК”ias tax~ПҮis.
S.FORM: amus minnatasipalincia mais sivitun a laak adu ingadah minnatasipalin at mapising a uvaaza mas cin tumbak adiia hai namuzaszas a pahusaza at masisivit a sisiuha tu mikuabis uvaazan namapa'ias tahis.
S.PHON: amus minnataЙ•ipal~Й¬inКЁia mais Й•ivitun a l~Й¬aak adu iЕӢadax~ПҮ minnataЙ•ipal~Й¬in at mapiЙ•iЕӢ a uvaaГ°a mas КЁin tumbak adiia x~ПҮai namuГ°asГ°as a pax~ПҮusaГ°a at maЙ•iЙ•ivit a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa tu mikuabis uvaaГ°an namapaК”ias tax~ПҮis.
S.TRANSL: It turns out on the next page that the kid was afraid when he looked inside the hole, the nest would suddenly drop. Then the frog kept on seeing how the kid covered his face.

S.FORM: at maza asua hai asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: at maГ°a asua x~ПҮai asa maus pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia.
S.FORM: at maza asua hai asa maus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: at maГ°a asua x~ПҮai asa maus pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia.
S.TRANSL: That dog wants to eat the hornets.

S.FORM: hai mikuin a mapising a uvaaza hai mais cinhaiap hai nakasinapun.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai mikuin a mapiЙ•iЕӢ a uvaaГ°a x~ПҮai mais КЁinx~ПҮaiap x~ПҮai nakaЙ•inapun.
S.FORM: hai mikuin a mapising a uvaaza hai mais cinhaiap hai nakasinapun.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai mikuin a mapiЙ•iЕӢ a uvaaГ°a x~ПҮai mais КЁinx~ПҮaiap x~ПҮai nakaЙ•inapun.
S.TRANSL: But the child was afraid. What should he do if he is chased since it suddenly knows?

S.FORM: maza asu hai nii tu mapising malkalapat tu asa maun.
S.PHON: maГ°a asu x~ПҮai nii tu mapiЙ•iЕӢ mal~Й¬kal~Й¬apat tu asa maun.
S.FORM: maza asu hai nii tu mapising malkalapat tu asa maun.
S.PHON: maГ°a asu x~ПҮai nii tu mapiЙ•iЕӢ mal~Й¬kal~Й¬apat tu asa maun.
S.TRANSL: That dog was not afraid, staying there and looking up, eager to eat.

S.FORM: at aupa adiia at adii hai sibuzbuzun sihalhalun hai ka makbina cinsivusin amina adiia tu mazanga nakaununtas pahusazcia hai askadii sia lumah tu halhalun mun'apav maupatia.
S.PHON: at aupa adiia at adii x~ПҮai Й•ibuГ°buГ°un Й•ix~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬un x~ПҮai ka makbina КЁinЙ•ivuЙ•in amina adiia tu maГ°aЕӢa nakaununtas pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia x~ПҮai askadii Й•ia l~Й¬umax~ПҮ tu x~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬un munК”apav maupatia.
S.FORM: at aupa adiia at adii hai sibuzbuzun sihalhalun hai ka makbina cinsivusin amina adiia tu mazanga nakaununtas pahusazcia hai askadii sia lumah tu halhalun mun'apav maupatia.
S.PHON: at aupa adiia at adii x~ПҮai Й•ibuГ°buГ°un Й•ix~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬un x~ПҮai ka makbina КЁinЙ•ivuЙ•in amina adiia tu maГ°aЕӢa nakaununtas pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia x~ПҮai askadii Й•ia l~Й¬umax~ПҮ tu x~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬un munК”apav maupatia.
S.TRANSL: еӣ зӮәйӮЈеҖӢиў«жӢүжҺүдёӢдҫҶ... зңӢеҗ§!д»–еҖ‘зӘҒз„¶йғҪиҪүй ӯ,йӮЈдәӣиҰҒеҗғжҲ‘еҖ‘зҡ„иҷҺй ӯиңӮ,е°ұеҫһзү еҖ‘жҺүдёӢдҫҶзҡ„е®¶еҮәдҫҶдәҶ.
It was pulled downвҖҰ Look, suddenly they all turned their heads вҖ” those hornets that would eat us were just coming out from the nest which had dropped down.

S.FORM: ai minnadii masisinap minnadii sia bununcia hai namikua saia.
S.PHON: ai minnadii maЙ•iЙ•inap minnadii Й•ia bununКЁia x~ПҮai namikua saia.
S.FORM: ai minnadii masisinap minnadii sia bununcia hai namikua saia.
S.PHON: ai minnadii maЙ•iЙ•inap minnadii Й•ia bununКЁia x~ПҮai namikua saia.

TRANSL.notes: (They) chased the person till there. What could he do?

S.TRANSL: chased the person till there. What could he do?

S.FORM: natunghabin saia sia libuscia sian sinluum.
S.PHON: natuЕӢx~ПҮabin saia Й•ia l~Й¬ibusКЁia Й•ian Й•inl~Й¬uum.
S.FORM: natunghabin saia sia libuscia sian sinluum.
S.PHON: natuЕӢx~ПҮabin saia Й•ia l~Й¬ibusКЁia Й•ian Й•inl~Й¬uum.
S.TRANSL: Would he hide in that forest? Was there a wall?

S.FORM: lukis tunghabin saia ngadahcia.
S.PHON: l~Й¬ukis tuЕӢx~ПҮabin saia ЕӢadax~ПҮКЁia.
S.FORM: lukis tunghabin saia ngadahcia.
S.PHON: l~Й¬ukis tuЕӢx~ПҮabin saia ЕӢadax~ПҮКЁia.

S.FORM: nasinapus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: naЙ•inapus pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia.
S.FORM: nasinapus pahusazcia.
S.PHON: naЙ•inapus pax~ПҮusaГ°КЁia.
S.TRANSL: He would be chased by the hornets.

S.FORM: hai maza asu hai valavalaang isia lukis malkalapat tu maihalhal mas pahusaz.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai maГ°a asu x~ПҮai val~Й¬aval~Й¬aaЕӢ iЙ•ia l~Й¬ukis mal~Й¬kal~Й¬apat tu maix~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬ mas pax~ПҮusaГ°.
S.FORM: hai maza asu hai valavalaang isia lukis malkalapat tu maihalhal mas pahusaz.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai maГ°a asu x~ПҮai val~Й¬aval~Й¬aaЕӢ iЙ•ia l~Й¬ukis mal~Й¬kal~Й¬apat tu maix~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬ mas pax~ПҮusaГ°.
S.TRANSL: But that dog, still unaware, kept looking up at the tree for the hornet's nest that had already fallen down.

S.FORM: mapising amin diia malala'la mastatala tu isabis imita cina.
S.PHON: mapiЙ•iЕӢ amin diia mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a mastatal~Й¬a tu isabis imita КЁina.
S.FORM: mapising amin diia malala'la mastatala tu isabis imita cina.
S.PHON: mapiЙ•iЕӢ amin diia mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a mastatal~Й¬a tu isabis imita КЁina.
S.TRANSL: Everybody was afraid over there and kept waiting and screaming "where is our mom?"

S.FORM: at minnadii hai ka minsuma ithuuan at ka askadiia pahusaza at.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai ka minsuma itx~ПҮuuan at ka askadiia pax~ПҮusaГ°a at.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai ka minsuma ithuuan at ka askadiia pahusaza at.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai ka minsuma itx~ПҮuuan at ka askadiia pax~ПҮusaГ°a at.
S.TRANSL: Then there, an owl came, and then the hornets got there.

S.FORM: sinapun a asu hai aupa maihalhal.
S.PHON: Й•inapun a asu x~ПҮai aupa maix~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬.
S.FORM: sinapun a asu hai aupa maihalhal.
S.PHON: Й•inapun a asu x~ПҮai aupa maix~ПҮal~Й¬x~ПҮal~Й¬.

TRANSL.notes: The dog was chased because he had taken down (the hornet).

S.TRANSL: The dog was chased because he had taken down .

S.FORM: mmm kaz a uvaaza ka mabis kandundah saitan adii ai.
S.PHON: mmm kaГ° a uvaaГ°a ka mabis kandundax~ПҮ saitan adii ai.
S.FORM: mmm kaz a uvaaza ka mabis kandundah saitan adii ai.
S.PHON: mmm kaГ° a uvaaГ°a ka mabis kandundax~ПҮ saitan adii ai.
S.TRANSL: As for the children, who kicked him?

S.FORM: maltataunghu sia cinunghabinan saicia tu mazang hai masitaunghu vakala.
S.PHON: mal~Й¬tatauЕӢx~ПҮu Й•ia КЁinuЕӢx~ПҮabinan saiКЁia tu maГ°aЕӢ x~ПҮai maЙ•itauЕӢx~ПҮu vakal~Й¬a.
S.FORM: maltataunghu sia cinunghabinan saicia tu mazang hai masitaunghu vakala.
S.PHON: mal~Й¬tatauЕӢx~ПҮu Й•ia КЁinuЕӢx~ПҮabinan saiКЁia tu maГ°aЕӢ x~ПҮai maЙ•itauЕӢx~ПҮu vakal~Й¬a.
S.TRANSL: He fell on his back at where he had hidden.

S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh inkaduas saicia.
S.PHON: ukaaЕӢ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ inkaduas saiКЁia.
S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh inkaduas saicia.
S.PHON: ukaaЕӢ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ inkaduas saiКЁia.
S.TRANSL: The frog still could't be found.

S.FORM: mmm hai mabis kandundah.
S.PHON: mmm x~ПҮai mabis kandundax~ПҮ.
S.FORM: mmm hai mabis kandundah.
S.PHON: mmm x~ПҮai mabis kandundax~ПҮ.

S.FORM: mmm ithuutan.
S.PHON: mmm itx~ПҮuutan.
S.FORM: mmm ithuutan.
S.PHON: mmm itx~ПҮuutan.

S.FORM: kandundahas ithuucia. a
S.PHON: kandundax~ПҮas itx~ПҮuuКЁia. a
S.FORM: kandundahas ithuucia. a
S.PHON: kandundax~ПҮas itx~ПҮuuКЁia. a
S.TRANSL: It was kicked by the owl, right?

S.FORM: ung hangsia ingadah ithuua sia lukiscia hai kungadahus saicia kikilim hai ka kandundahan a saia.
S.PHON: uЕӢ x~ПҮaЕӢЙ•ia iЕӢadax~ПҮ itx~ПҮuua Й•ia l~Й¬ukisКЁia x~ПҮai kuЕӢadax~ПҮus saiКЁia kikil~Й¬im x~ПҮai ka kandundax~ПҮan a saia.
S.FORM: ung hangsia ingadah ithuua sia lukiscia hai kungadahus saicia kikilim hai ka kandundahan a saia.
S.PHON: uЕӢ x~ПҮaЕӢЙ•ia iЕӢadax~ПҮ itx~ПҮuua Й•ia l~Й¬ukisКЁia x~ПҮai kuЕӢadax~ПҮus saiКЁia kikil~Й¬im x~ПҮai ka kandundax~ПҮan a saia.
S.TRANSL: It turned out the owl was inside the tree. It went in there and found and kicked him out.

S.FORM: mmm aupa macisbai a asua hai kui askadii pahusaz tu masisinapa.
S.PHON: mmm aupa maКЁisbai a asua x~ПҮai kui askadii pax~ПҮusaГ° tu maЙ•iЙ•inapa.
S.FORM: mmm aupa macisbai a asua hai kui askadii pahusaz tu masisinapa.
S.PHON: mmm aupa maКЁisbai a asua x~ПҮai kui askadii pax~ПҮusaГ° tu maЙ•iЙ•inapa.

TRANSL.notes: Then the dog suddenly ran off because the hornets there kept chasing (it).

S.TRANSL: Then the dog suddenly ran off because the hornets there kept chasing .

S.FORM: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapa'ia bungu tu namikua mais minsuma pahusaz ka.
S.PHON: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapaК”ia buЕӢu tu namikua mais minsuma pax~ПҮusaГ° ka.
S.FORM: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapa'ia bungu tu namikua mais minsuma pahusaz ka.
S.PHON: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu diia mapaК”ia buЕӢu tu namikua mais minsuma pax~ПҮusaГ° ka.
S.TRANSL: Then all the young people went there and tried their best to cover their head. How would it be if the hornets came? Just this way.

S.FORM: malala'laang a saia hai kui uka at aizin a hanvang tu ngabul mun'apav a hanvanga tu.
S.PHON: mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬aaЕӢ a saia x~ПҮai kui uka at aiГ°in a x~ПҮanvaЕӢ tu ЕӢabul~Й¬ munК”apav a x~ПҮanvaЕӢa tu.
S.FORM: malala'laang a saia hai kui uka at aizin a hanvang tu ngabul mun'apav a hanvanga tu.
S.PHON: mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬aaЕӢ a saia x~ПҮai kui uka at aiГ°in a x~ПҮanvaЕӢ tu ЕӢabul~Й¬ munК”apav a x~ПҮanvaЕӢa tu.
S.TRANSL: He was still calling but still it wasn't there. Then it was deer's antlers вҖ” the deer came out.

S.FORM: namindangaz saicin.
S.PHON: namindaЕӢaГ° saiКЁin.
S.FORM: namindangaz saicin.
S.PHON: namindaЕӢaГ° saiКЁin.

S.FORM: at minnadii hai kui itasipalin asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai kui itaЙ•ipal~Й¬in asua.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai kui itasipalin asua.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai kui itaЙ•ipal~Й¬in asua.
S.TRANSL: Then how would the dog that is already on the other side get there?

S.FORM: idadaza saia sia ludun.
S.PHON: idadaГ°a saia Й•ia l~Й¬udun.
S.FORM: idadaza saia sia ludun.
S.PHON: idadaГ°a saia Й•ia l~Й¬udun.

S.FORM: aiza ngabula malala'la mas sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiГ°a ЕӢabul~Й¬a mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a mas Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.FORM: aiza ngabula malala'la mas sisiuh.
S.PHON: aiГ°a ЕӢabul~Й¬a mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a mas Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: There was a deer, it keeps on calling a frog.

S.FORM: mmm lala'laus saicia sisiuh tu minsumaa hai ka uka minsusuma.
S.PHON: mmm l~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬aus saiКЁia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ tu minsumaa x~ПҮai ka uka minsusuma.
S.FORM: mmm lala'laus saicia sisiuh tu minsumaa hai ka uka minsusuma.
S.PHON: mmm l~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬aus saiКЁia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ tu minsumaa x~ПҮai ka uka minsusuma.
S.TRANSL: It kept calling the frog: "Come!" But still he didn't come.

S.FORM: at minnadii hai mun'apavin a hanvanga adadazadii uvaaza sia hanvanga malala'la at anastu asua malala'la amin kikilim.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai munК”apavin a x~ПҮanvaЕӢa adadaГ°adii uvaaГ°a Й•ia x~ПҮanvaЕӢa mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a at anastu asua mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a amin kikil~Й¬im.
S.FORM: at minnadii hai mun'apavin a hanvanga adadazadii uvaaza sia hanvanga malala'la at anastu asua malala'la amin kikilim.
S.PHON: at minnadii x~ПҮai munК”apavin a x~ПҮanvaЕӢa adadaГ°adii uvaaГ°a Й•ia x~ПҮanvaЕӢa mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a at anastu asua mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a amin kikil~Й¬im.
S.TRANSL: Then there, the deer came out with the child kept yelling on it. The dog yelled and searched below.

S.FORM: at askadiipin sia ngabula mamamas uvaaz.
S.PHON: at askadiipin Й•ia ЕӢabul~Й¬a mamamas uvaaГ°.
S.FORM: at askadiipin sia ngabula mamamas uvaaz.
S.PHON: at askadiipin Й•ia ЕӢabul~Й¬a mamamas uvaaГ°.
S.TRANSL: Then there, the deer carried the child on its back.

S.FORM: askadii asua kikilim sia ismuut hai ka uka sia lukis hai uka at.
S.PHON: askadii asua kikil~Й¬im Й•ia ismuut x~ПҮai ka uka Й•ia l~Й¬ukis x~ПҮai uka at.
S.FORM: askadii asua kikilim sia ismuut hai ka uka sia lukis hai uka at.
S.PHON: askadii asua kikil~Й¬im Й•ia ismuut x~ПҮai ka uka Й•ia l~Й¬ukis x~ПҮai uka at.
S.TRANSL: The dog got there and looked on the grass, but it wasn't there; on the tree, but it wasn't there.

S.FORM: at aizin a adiia aupa adiia hai ukaang inkaduan minnadiipin hai adiipin asua inkaduanin sisiuha.
S.PHON: at aiГ°in a adiia aupa adiia x~ПҮai ukaaЕӢ inkaduan minnadiipin x~ПҮai adiipin asua inkaduanin Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.
S.FORM: at aizin a adiia aupa adiia hai ukaang inkaduan minnadiipin hai adiipin asua inkaduanin sisiuha.
S.PHON: at aiГ°in a adiia aupa adiia x~ПҮai ukaaЕӢ inkaduan minnadiipin x~ПҮai adiipin asua inkaduanin Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa.
S.TRANSL: Then there it was. Because there was still nothing to be found, the dog got there and found the frog.

S.FORM: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantunghaz amin ka pistunghaz.
S.PHON: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantuЕӢx~ПҮaГ° amin ka pistuЕӢx~ПҮaГ°.
S.FORM: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantunghaz amin ka pistunghaz.
S.PHON: ai ka minkuabis adiia tu kantuЕӢx~ПҮaГ° amin ka pistuЕӢx~ПҮaГ°.
S.TRANSL: Uhm, how was it over there, he was kicked, he fell.

S.FORM: namaikusnasian aupa saia sia adii tu ismuuttan mun'apav.
S.PHON: namaikusnaЙ•ian aupa saia Й•ia adii tu ismuuttan munК”apav.
S.FORM: namaikusnasian aupa saia sia adii tu ismuuttan mun'apav.
S.PHON: namaikusnaЙ•ian aupa saia Й•ia adii tu ismuuttan munК”apav.
S.TRANSL: Did he come out from the grass there?

S.FORM: minnasaincia at aizin a adiia hazama dadusa sinuka maisinuk hazam hai.
S.PHON: minnasainКЁia at aiГ°in a adiia x~ПҮaГ°ama dadusa Й•inuka maiЙ•inuk x~ПҮaГ°am x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: minnasaincia at aizin a adiia hazama dadusa sinuka maisinuk hazam hai.
S.PHON: minnasainКЁia at aiГ°in a adiia x~ПҮaГ°ama dadusa Й•inuka maiЙ•inuk x~ПҮaГ°am x~ПҮai.
S.TRANSL: To there, there were two birds and a nest, an empty nest.

S.FORM: naminnasaincia aupa naia mais sanganin sadu tu at makua sian kungadah sia libuscia.
S.PHON: naminnasainКЁia aupa naia mais saЕӢanin sadu tu at makua Й•ian kuЕӢadax~ПҮ Й•ia l~Й¬ibusКЁia.
S.FORM: naminnasaincia aupa naia mais sanganin sadu tu at makua sian kungadah sia libuscia.
S.PHON: naminnasainКЁia aupa naia mais saЕӢanin sadu tu at makua Й•ian kuЕӢadax~ПҮ Й•ia l~Й¬ibusКЁia.
S.TRANSL: To there, later when they sawвҖҰ How would he go inside the forest?

S.FORM: ai maupacia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana hanvangcia ciu naitan minaizin sisiuha tu minaiza ngabulan mun'apavan.
S.PHON: ai maupaКЁia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana x~ПҮanvaЕӢКЁia КЁiu naitan minaiГ°in Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa tu minaiГ°a ЕӢabul~Й¬an munК”apavan.
S.FORM: ai maupacia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana hanvangcia ciu naitan minaizin sisiuha tu minaiza ngabulan mun'apavan.
S.PHON: ai maupaКЁia tu maupa tu mais inaak tu saduan ana x~ПҮanvaЕӢКЁia КЁiu naitan minaiГ°in Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa tu minaiГ°a ЕӢabul~Й¬an munК”apavan.
S.TRANSL: Just like that, like what I see, the deer saved them, the frog and the deer's appearance.

S.FORM: maupacia nii aupa ukas ciu naitan.
S.PHON: maupaКЁia nii aupa ukas КЁiu naitan.
S.FORM: maupacia nii aupa ukas ciu naitan.
S.PHON: maupaКЁia nii aupa ukas КЁiu naitan.

S.FORM: ungat minnadii hai ka undusaanin a uvaaza mas asu maltatakzang tu.
S.PHON: uЕӢat minnadii x~ПҮai ka undusaanin a uvaaГ°a mas asu mal~Й¬tatakГ°aЕӢ tu.
S.FORM: ungat minnadii hai ka undusaanin a uvaaza mas asu maltatakzang tu.
S.PHON: uЕӢat minnadii x~ПҮai ka undusaanin a uvaaГ°a mas asu mal~Й¬tatakГ°aЕӢ tu.
S.TRANSL: Then, the child and the dog lay down together.

S.FORM: mun'apavin sia danum danum naia iskaupduh.
S.PHON: munК”apavin Й•ia danum danum naia iskaupdux~ПҮ.
S.FORM: mun'apavin sia danum danum naia iskaupduh.
S.PHON: munК”apavin Й•ia danum danum naia iskaupdux~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: They came out of the water, they were thrown in the water.

S.FORM: adii hanvanga malsisivit tu naciu.
S.PHON: adii x~ПҮanvaЕӢa mal~Й¬Й•iЙ•ivit tu naКЁiu.
S.FORM: adii hanvanga malsisivit tu naciu.
S.PHON: adii x~ПҮanvaЕӢa mal~Й¬Й•iЙ•ivit tu naКЁiu.
S.TRANSL: That deer kept seeing if they were saved.

S.FORM: minnadii mun'apavin sia danum hai.
S.PHON: minnadii munК”apavin Й•ia danum x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: minnadii mun'apavin sia danum hai.
S.PHON: minnadii munК”apavin Й•ia danum x~ПҮai.

TRANSL.notes: Here (on this page), they came out of the water.

S.TRANSL: Here , they came out of the water.

S.FORM: at ka masasiahu tu ka asua anbunguun saicia ciu at.
S.PHON: at ka masaЙ•iax~ПҮu tu ka asua anbuЕӢuun saiКЁia КЁiu at.
S.FORM: at ka masasiahu tu ka asua anbunguun saicia ciu at.
S.PHON: at ka masaЙ•iax~ПҮu tu ka asua anbuЕӢuun saiКЁia КЁiu at.
S.TRANSL: Then, on the contrary, the dog was saved by being held on his head.

S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: ukaaЕӢ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ munК”apav.
S.FORM: ukaang a sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: ukaaЕӢ a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ munК”apav.
S.TRANSL: The frog still hadn't come out yet.

S.FORM: mmm naminnasia andii mazan sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: mmm naminnaЙ•ia andii maГ°an Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ munК”apav.
S.FORM: mmm naminnasia andii mazan sisiuh mun'apav.
S.PHON: mmm naminnaЙ•ia andii maГ°an Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ munК”apav.
S.TRANSL: Here, did the frog come out?

S.FORM: minnadii hai mun'apav a asu sia danum hai tupaus saicia tu kaa tu pataliva na aiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: minnadii x~ПҮai munК”apav a asu Й•ia danum x~ПҮai tupaus saiКЁia tu kaa tu patal~Й¬iva na aiГ°a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.FORM: minnadii hai mun'apav a asu sia danum hai tupaus saicia tu kaa tu pataliva na aiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: minnadii x~ПҮai munК”apav a asu Й•ia danum x~ПҮai tupaus saiКЁia tu kaa tu patal~Й¬iva na aiГ°a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: Here, the dog came out from the water and it was told not to speak because there would be frogs.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadii hai mun'apav a asua at nasi'apav saia sisiuh adii.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadii x~ПҮai munК”apav a asua at naЙ•iК”apav saia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ adii.
S.FORM: at aupa minnadii hai mun'apav a asua at nasi'apav saia sisiuh adii.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadii x~ПҮai munК”apav a asua at naЙ•iК”apav saia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ adii.

TRANSL.notes: Then here (on this page), the dog came out. Would it pull out frogs there?

S.TRANSL: Then here , the dog came out. Would it pull out frogs there?

S.FORM: mmm malmamangdav sia lukis tu uvaaz tu uhtung.
S.PHON: mmm mal~Й¬mamaЕӢdav Й•ia l~Й¬ukis tu uvaaГ° tu ux~ПҮtuЕӢ.
S.FORM: mmm malmamangdav sia lukis tu uvaaz tu uhtung.
S.PHON: mmm mal~Й¬mamaЕӢdav Й•ia l~Й¬ukis tu uvaaГ° tu ux~ПҮtuЕӢ.
S.TRANSL: The child looked down from the piece of wood.

S.FORM: mmm adii masisivit tu na minsuma sisiuh.
S.PHON: mmm adii maЙ•iЙ•ivit tu na minsuma Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.FORM: mmm adii masisivit tu na minsuma sisiuh.
S.PHON: mmm adii maЙ•iЙ•ivit tu na minsuma Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: He kept looking over there, wondering if the frog would appear.

S.FORM: at tupaus adiita asua tu pataliva kaa tu lulunglung tu'ia.
S.PHON: at tupaus adiita asua tu patal~Й¬iva kaa tu l~Й¬ul~Й¬uЕӢl~Й¬uЕӢ tuК”ia.
S.FORM: at tupaus adiita asua tu pataliva kaa tu lulunglung tu'ia.
S.PHON: at tupaus adiita asua tu patal~Й¬iva kaa tu l~Й¬ul~Й¬uЕӢl~Й¬uЕӢ tuК”ia.
S.TRANSL: Then he told the dog not to bark or howl.

S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai tuza tu adiipin at sisiuha undusaan.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~ПҮai tuГ°a tu adiipin at Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa undusaan.
S.FORM: at minnadiipin hai tuza tu adiipin at sisiuha undusaan.
S.PHON: at minnadiipin x~ПҮai tuГ°a tu adiipin at Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa undusaan.
S.TRANSL: Then here, there were really two frogs together.

S.FORM: at manaskalin naia tu aizin a sian.
S.PHON: at manaskal~Й¬in naia tu aiГ°in a Й•ian.
S.FORM: at manaskalin naia tu aizin a sian.
S.PHON: at manaskal~Й¬in naia tu aiГ°in a Й•ian.
S.TRANSL: They were happy that here it was.

S.FORM: nakudii a asua nasiza saicia naciu saicia maliba.
S.PHON: nakudii a asua naЙ•iГ°a saiКЁia naКЁiu saiКЁia mal~Й¬iba.
S.FORM: nakudii a asua nasiza saicia naciu saicia maliba.
S.PHON: nakudii a asua naЙ•iГ°a saiКЁia naКЁiu saiКЁia mal~Й¬iba.
S.TRANSL: The dog would go take and save him, holding him in his arms.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadazain sia lukis saia at.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadaГ°ain Й•ia l~Й¬ukis saia at.
S.FORM: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadazain sia lukis saia at.
S.PHON: at aupa minnadiipin naia kudadaГ°ain Й•ia l~Й¬ukis saia at.
S.TRANSL: Then there, they went on the wood.

S.FORM: adiipin supahin a adiia sisiuha inkaduanin hai.
S.PHON: adiipin supax~ПҮin a adiia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa inkaduanin x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: adiipin supahin a adiia sisiuha inkaduanin hai.
S.PHON: adiipin supax~ПҮin a adiia Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮa inkaduanin x~ПҮai.

S.FORM: manaskalin naia ka supahang asia saias uvaaz tas'an mazmaz ka supah.
S.PHON: manaskal~Й¬in naia ka supax~ПҮaЕӢ aЙ•ia saias uvaaГ° tasК”an maГ°maГ° ka supax~ПҮ.
S.FORM: manaskalin naia ka supahang asia saias uvaaz tas'an mazmaz ka supah.
S.PHON: manaskal~Й¬in naia ka supax~ПҮaЕӢ aЙ•ia saias uvaaГ° tasК”an maГ°maГ° ka supax~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: They became very happy because he and many children, siblings and the like were there.

S.FORM: mmm adiicia aupa dinamu naicia tu cina at.
S.PHON: mmm adiiКЁia aupa dinamu naiКЁia tu КЁina at.
S.FORM: mmm adiicia aupa dinamu naicia tu cina at.
S.PHON: mmm adiiКЁia aupa dinamu naiКЁia tu КЁina at.
S.TRANSL: There then they grabbed their mother.

S.FORM: kasupah a maupa uvaaza tama adiia asia tu tama cina tama.
S.PHON: kasupax~ПҮ a maupa uvaaГ°a tama adiia aЙ•ia tu tama КЁina tama.
S.FORM: kasupah a maupa uvaaza tama adiia asia tu tama cina tama.
S.PHON: kasupax~ПҮ a maupa uvaaГ°a tama adiia aЙ•ia tu tama КЁina tama.
S.TRANSL: The father and mother had so many children.

S.FORM: hai maupacia hai minaupacia at manaskalin a naia minaizin tu tas tu lumah maupacia supah tu asucias uvaazcia hai minaiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai maupaКЁia x~ПҮai minaupaКЁia at manaskal~Й¬in a naia minaiГ°in tu tas tu l~Й¬umax~ПҮ maupaКЁia supax~ПҮ tu asuКЁias uvaaГ°КЁia x~ПҮai minaiГ°a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.FORM: hai maupacia hai minaupacia at manaskalin a naia minaizin tu tas tu lumah maupacia supah tu asucias uvaazcia hai minaiza sisiuh.
S.PHON: x~ПҮai maupaКЁia x~ПҮai minaupaКЁia at manaskal~Й¬in a naia minaiГ°in tu tas tu l~Й¬umax~ПҮ maupaКЁia supax~ПҮ tu asuКЁias uvaaГ°КЁia x~ПҮai minaiГ°a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ.
S.TRANSL: They became so happy for the fact that there was a big family, with a dog, a child, and also a frog.

S.FORM: mmm maupacia tu maupacia hai.
S.PHON: mmm maupaКЁia tu maupaКЁia x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: mmm maupacia tu maupacia hai.
S.PHON: mmm maupaКЁia tu maupaКЁia x~ПҮai.

S.FORM: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asucia hai.
S.PHON: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asuКЁia x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asucia hai.
S.PHON: namudaanin naia antabanun a tasa mas asuКЁia x~ПҮai.
S.TRANSL: They were leaving, the dog took one away.

S.FORM: nasidahdain hai.
S.PHON: naЙ•idax~ПҮdain x~ПҮai.
S.FORM: nasidahdain hai.
S.PHON: naЙ•idax~ПҮdain x~ПҮai.

S.FORM: malala'la adiicia hai baibaiun naicia saicinun tu namudaanin.
S.PHON: mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a adiiКЁia x~ПҮai baibaiun naiКЁia saiКЁinun tu namudaanin.
S.FORM: malala'la adiicia hai baibaiun naicia saicinun tu namudaanin.
S.PHON: mal~Й¬al~Й¬aК”l~Й¬a adiiКЁia x~ПҮai baibaiun naiКЁia saiКЁinun tu namudaanin.

TRANSL.notes: They shouted to them: "Bye-bye! See you!" (They) were leaving.

S.TRANSL: They shouted to them: "Bye-bye! See you!" were leaving.

S.FORM: adiidau naia mi'ukuli masatu tundadaan.
S.PHON: adiidau naia miК”ukul~Й¬i masatu tundadaan.
S.FORM: adiidau naia mi'ukuli masatu tundadaan.
S.PHON: adiidau naia miК”ukul~Й¬i masatu tundadaan.
S.TRANSL: It looks like they were sent off there.

S.FORM: andii kusunun a sisiuh mudaan.
S.PHON: andii kusunun a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ mudaan.
S.FORM: andii kusunun a sisiuh mudaan.
S.PHON: andii kusunun a Й•iЙ•iux~ПҮ mudaan.
S.TRANSL: The frog left while being held.

S.FORM: pangausun a asua.
S.PHON: paЕӢausun a asua.
S.FORM: pangausun a asua.
S.PHON: paЕӢausun a asua.
S.TRANSL: The dog was made to walk in front.

S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaКЁia.
S.FORM: kaupacia.
S.PHON: kaupaКЁia.
